cards.name: Oscillators
cards.tagline: Sine, saw, square, triangle, phasor, ramp, and noise sources.

cards.name: FM Synthesis
cards.tagline: Carrier/modulator frequency modulation with rational ratios.

cards.name: Samplers
cards.tagline: One-shot and looping playback with kit shortcuts.

cards.name: SoundFonts
cards.tagline: General MIDI preset playback via SF2/SF3 fonts.

cards.name: Samples Loading
cards.tagline: Pull sample banks from GitHub, HTTP, or local files.

cards.name: Lowpass
cards.snippetHtml: osc("saw", 220) |> lp(%, 800)

cards.name: Highpass
cards.snippetHtml: osc("saw", 110) |> hp(%, 200)

cards.name: Bandpass
cards.snippetHtml: osc("saw", 220) |> bp(%, 1000, 4)

cards.name: Moog
cards.snippetHtml: osc("saw", 55) |> moog(%, 400, 2)

cards.name: Sallen-Key
cards.snippetHtml: osc("saw", 55) |> sallenkey(%, 600, 3)

cards.name: ADSR
cards.snippetHtml: osc("sin", 440) * adsr(trigger(2), 0.01, 0.2)

cards.name: AR
cards.snippetHtml: osc("sin", 55) * ar(trigger(4), 0.001, 0.2)

cards.name: Delay
cards.snippetHtml: osc("saw", 220) |> delay(%, 0.5, 0.4)

cards.name: Delay (ms)
cards.snippetHtml: osc("saw", 220) |> delay_ms(%, 300, 0.4)

cards.name: Tap Delay
cards.snippetHtml: osc("saw", 110) |> tap_delay(%, 0.375, 0.7, (x) -> lp(x, 1500))

cards.name: Freeverb
cards.snippetHtml: osc("saw", 220) * ar(trigger(2)) |> freeverb(%, 0.5, 0.5)

cards.name: Dattorro
cards.snippetHtml: osc("saw", 220) * ar(trigger(2)) |> dattorro(%, 0.8, 30)

cards.name: FDN
cards.snippetHtml: osc("saw", 55) * ar(trigger(0.5)) |> fdn(%, 0.9, 0.4)

cards.name: Chorus
cards.snippetHtml: osc("saw", 220) |> chorus(%, 0.5, 0.5)

cards.name: Flanger
cards.snippetHtml: osc("saw", 110) |> flanger(%, 0.5, 0.7)

cards.name: Phaser
cards.snippetHtml: osc("saw", 110) |> phaser(%, 0.3, 0.8)

cards.name: Comb
cards.snippetHtml: osc("noise") |> comb(%, 1/220, 0.95)

cards.name: Saturate
cards.snippetHtml: osc("saw", 110) |> saturate(%, 3)

cards.name: Softclip
cards.snippetHtml: osc("saw", 220) |> softclip(%, 0.7)

cards.name: Bitcrush
cards.snippetHtml: osc("saw", 220) |> bitcrush(%, 8, 0.5)

cards.name: Fold
cards.snippetHtml: osc("sin", 110) * 2 |> fold(%, 0.5)

cards.name: Tube
cards.snippetHtml: osc("saw", 110) |> tube(%, 5, 0.1)

cards.name: Smooth
cards.snippetHtml: osc("saw", 220) |> smooth(%, 3)

cards.name: Tape
cards.snippetHtml: osc("saw", 110) |> tape(%, 4, 0.4)

cards.name: XFMR
cards.snippetHtml: osc("saw", 55) |> xfmr(%, 4, 8)

cards.name: Excite
cards.snippetHtml: osc("saw", 220) |> excite(%, 0.5, 3000)

cards.name: Compressor
cards.snippetHtml: osc("saw", 110) * ar(trigger(2)) |> comp(%, -12, 4)

cards.name: Limiter
cards.snippetHtml: osc("saw", 110) * 2 |> limiter(%, -0.1, 0.1)

cards.name: Gate
cards.snippetHtml: osc("noise") * ar(trigger(8), 0.001, 0.05) |> gate(%, -20, 10)

cards.name: Sequences
cards.snippet: pat("c4 e4 g4 c5") |> ((f) -> osc("sin", f) * ar(trigger(4)))
cards.snippetHtml: pat("c4 e4 g4 c5") |> ((f) -> osc("sin", f) * ar(trigger(4)))

cards.name: Polyrhythms
cards.snippet: pat("c4 e4 g4, c3 g3 c3 g3")
cards.snippetHtml: pat("c4 e4 g4, c3 g3 c3 g3")

cards.name: Alternation
cards.snippetHtml: pat("<c4 e4 g4>")

cards.name: Modifiers
cards.snippetHtml: pat("c4*4 e4")

cards.name: Microtonal Notation
cards.tagline: EDO tunings and per-note micro-step adjustments.

cards.name: Triads
cards.snippetHtml: chord("C")

cards.name: Sevenths
cards.snippet: chord("Cmaj7 Am7 Dm7 G7") |> mtof(%) |> osc("saw", %)
cards.snippetHtml: chord("Cmaj7 Am7 Dm7 G7") |> mtof(%) |> osc("saw", %)

cards.snippetHtml: chord("Cmaj7 Am7 Dm7 G7").voicing("drop2")

cards.name: Drop voicings
cards.snippetHtml: chord("Cmaj7").voicing("drop2")

cards.name: Clock
cards.snippetHtml: osc("saw", 110) |> delay(%, clock() / 4, 0.4)

cards.name: LFO
cards.snippetHtml: osc("sin", 220 + lfo(5) * 10)

cards.name: Trigger
cards.snippetHtml: osc("sin", 55) * ar(trigger(1), 0.01, 0.2)

cards.name: Euclidean
cards.snippetHtml: osc("sin", 55) * ar(euclid(3, 8), 0.01, 0.15)

cards.name: Pattern Transforms
cards.snippetHtml: pat("c4 e4 g4 b4").early(0.25)

cards.name: Pattern Generators
cards.snippetHtml: run(8) |> mtof(% + 60) |> osc("saw", %)

cards.name: Timeline
cards.snippetHtml: osc("saw", 220) * timeline("__/''")

cards.name: Poly
cards.snippet: pat("c4 e4 g4 b4") |> poly(@, (f, g, v) -> osc("sin", f) * v, 8)
cards.snippetHtml: pat("c4 e4 g4 b4") |> poly(@, (f, g, v) -> osc("sin", f) * v, 8)

cards.name: Spread
cards.snippetHtml: osc("saw", spread(5, [220, 220.7, 219.3, 221.4, 218.6]))

cards.tagline: Forward composition with -> and |>; the % hole.

cards.name: Trigonometry
cards.tagline: sin, cos, tan, asin, acos, atan, atan2.

cards.snippetHtml: osc("saw", 110) * 3 |> tanh(%)
